creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
Before we starting digging ourselves into the patching of include/, please
note that example programs use C++ standard library shipped with recent
clang.  My question is, what are the supported versions of the C++ standard
as of today libc++?

For instance, why does the algorithm header uses the macro not provided by
c++98 and not handshaked with the compiler core?
